Dilly D's Sports Grill was established in May 2018 by Dan Johnson and Dave Patterson. We are a family ran business where we love having the ability to provide our community with a wonderful dining experience. When you walk through the front doors, our clean establishment is very important in making a good first impression. Here at Dilly's, we want to always make sure that each of our guests have a clean dining experience. This to us is just as important as bringing out the food the way we would want to eat it. We pride ourselves in only serving high quality ingredients while focusing on the freshness and presentation of our food. When greeted by our welcoming staff, we ensure that all of our guests are treated like family. From the moment you walk in, to the moment you leave, we are proud to serve the best possible experience for our customers!
Better yet, see us in person!
